meta.title: BachGPT
meta.description:
Gear up for a thrilling journey with ChatGPT, MIDI technology, and none other than the maestro of counterpoints - JS Bach himself! Brace yourselves for a rollercoaster ride into the world of music intertwined with artificial intelligence. Let's dive in!
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jump on the hype train for this channel, and help me crank out even more wicked videos like this one:
https://www.patreon.com/NobodyandTheComputer
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------
contact me: 
nobodyandthecomputer@gmail.com
__________________________________________________

chatGPT:
https://openai.com/blog/chatgpt

Colab Notebook text2 MIDI:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/bachgpt-text-to-85162551

BachGPT prompt for chatGPT:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/bachgpt-prompt-85162417

Colab MIDI2Text
https://www.patreon.com/posts/midi2text-google-85162653
 
Bach Text prompt:
https://www.patreon.com/posts/bach-text-prompt-85165612
__________________________________________________

00:00 Intro
02:28 Prompt for ChatGPT
03:24 A J.S. Bach Motif with A.I.
05:13 A.I. Prelude
07:55 More Prompt for ChatGPT
09:34 Another A.I. Bach Composition
11:54 Bach, Wendy Carlos and Kubrick
13:40 Bach and Aphex Twin
14:39 Outro
